key_learnings: The gut microbiome composition directly affects digestion efficiency, immune responses, and mood regulation via the gut-brain axis.
research_findings: Lactobacillus and Bifidobacterium strains enhance short-chain fatty acid production; high-fiber diets significantly increase microbial diversity.
current_focus_areas: Investigating the relationship between dietary prebiotics and probiotic effectiveness; mapping microbiome shifts across different dietary interventions.
